message:
docs(readme): add compressed hero illustration and ignore macOS sidecar artifacts

Update repository presentation and commit hygiene for top-level documentation assets.

Details:

- Add sbh_illustration.webp (345,198 bytes) as the README hero image asset to keep render quality while staying near the requested ~350 KB footprint.

- Insert a centered image block at the top of README.md, following the same visual pattern used in /dp/xf/README.md.

- Extend .gitignore with ._* so AppleDouble sidecar files are never committed alongside binary/media assets.

The original PNG source was removed prior to this commit so only the compressed WebP is tracked.

files.patch:
@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@
 # OS files
 .DS_Store
 Thumbs.db
+._*
 
 # Local environment / secrets
 .env

@@ -1,5 +1,9 @@ # storage_ballast_helper (`sbh`) +
